title: To My Bestie - Thank You for Being My Unbiological Sister | Heartfelt Wooden Heart Plaque for Best Friends, Sentimental Gift for Unbiological Sisters, Friendship Keepsake
features: 💖 Heartfelt Message for Best Friends: This plaque features the touching quote: "To my Bestie, because of you I laugh a little harder, cry a little less, and smile a lot more. Thank you for being my unbiological sister." This message captures the essence of a friendship that feels more like family, making it a perfect gift for your closest friend.

🌟 Beautiful and Timeless Design: The plaque's neutral color palette and charming illustration of two friends holding hands make it a versatile piece that complements any decor. The elegant design adds warmth and meaning to any space, making it a cherished keepsake for your best friend.

🛠️ High-Quality MDF Craftsmanship: Crafted from premium MDF wood, this plaque is durable and aesthetically pleasing. The smooth finish and attention to detail ensure that it will remain a treasured item for years to come, symbolizing the strength and beauty of your friendship.

🖼️ Perfect Size for Any Display: Measuring approximately 10cm x 9cm (100mm x 90mm), this heart-shaped plaque is ideal for hanging on walls, doors, or as part of a gallery wall. The included twine makes it easy to display, adding a personal touch to any room in your home or your best friend's space.

🇬🇧 Handmade with Love in the UK: Proudly handmade by skilled artisans in the United Kingdom, this plaque reflects the care and craftsmanship that go into every piece. By choosing this plaque, you’re supporting local artisans and giving a gift that truly embodies the love and appreciation you have for your best friend.
description: Product Description Some Of Our Friendship Hanging Plaques Our charming hanging plaques, crafted from high-quality wood, come in a beautiful array of colors and feature thoughtful quotes—perfect for that special keepsake gift for a dear friend. These versatile wooden plaques can be elegantly presented in hampers, gift boxes, or as decorative tags on wine bottles and gift bags. Once gifted, they become cherished accents that can be proudly displayed in the home or office. Take a look around our wooden heart plaques The video showcases the product in use. With 1 hole which enables the plaque to be hung on a door, wall, or any chosen space with effortless grace Wood - Indoor Use ONLY Our Wooden option can only be used indoors. This is NOT for outdoor use Just some of the great ways to gift our heart plaques For Gift Hampers Add a touch of sentiment by including the heart plaque in gift hampers and boxes. For Occasion Thank you's Add the heart plaque to a Thank you, Birthday or Christmas gift bag for a charming and heartfelt touch. As Gift Bottle Tags Attach to a favourite wine, champagne bottle or beer hamper for a charming keepsake birthday tag. Gift That Someone Special Our charming hanging plaques are the ideal gift for any occasion. With their delightful designs, they add a touch of elegance to any room. Our heart range of plaques come with twine Come with twine Our plaques come with loose twine for you to tie yourself and cut to length. You can even swap out for ribbon of your choice should you wish Step one Simply fold the twine in half, thread the loop through the hole, thread the twine ends through the loop and pull tight Step two Next tie a knot at the top in the two loose ends to secure and finish the look Final Step! There are two ways to tie the ribbon as shown in the photo. You can also have your chosen length depending on how you are gifting and/or displaying See our other personalised gifts in the friendship range Friends like you!
